title: Stainless Steel Cookie Cutters for Winter and Christmas 4 Pieces
features: Set of stainless steel moulds for creative hobbies: Quantity: 4 piecesShapes: Muffle, Snowman, Angel, and Gingerman. Dimensions: approx. 7.5 cm. Material: stainless steel. Easy to clean, clean with soapy water. For cooking, modelling, patching art.

This assortment of winter and Christmas cookie cutters contains 4 stainless steel cutters that will allow you 1001 creations on the theme of Christmas of winter. These metal cutters will be ideal for making Christmas cookies or cutting marzipan or sugar paste in Christmas shapes to bring a decoration to all your homemade baked goods. With these 4 cookie cutters, you can cut a multitude of foods: shortbread, cookies, pizza dough, crumb bread, shortcrust and puff pastry, vegetables
description: This winter and Christmas set contains 4 stainless steel cutters that will allow you to 1001 winter Christmas themed creations
